channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Can Pakistan juggle US-Iran mediation with Saudi defence commitments?
item.description: Pakistani officials and a number of analysts say it can do both. But the balancing act won't be easy.

item.title: Iran remains an obstacle to the ‘Greater Israel’ project
item.description: Israel wants to expand in the Middle East. Its failure to defeat Iran is a major setback for its hegemonic plans.

item.title: How much will US Hormuz blockade hurt Iran, and does Tehran have an escape?
item.description: Iran earned $5bn in oil exports in past month while it shut the strait for most other ships. That revenue is at risk.

item.title: How many ships have passed the Strait of Hormuz and how many were attacked?
item.description: Ship-tracking data shows 279 ships have passed through the strait and 22 have been attacked since the war on Iran began.

item.title: Who controls the Strait of Hormuz?
item.description: A US move to block the strait has intensified a broader struggle over who controls access and under what terms.

item.title: Global oil demand to plunge amid disruptions caused by war on Iran: IEA
item.description: The IEA's oil 'demand destruction' report comes after its chief said unnamed countries are hoarding stocks.

item.title: Israel-Lebanon direct talks in the US: All to know
item.description: Israel and Lebanon hold first direct talks since 1993, but Hezbollah's rejection threatens the US-brokered effort.

item.title: Iran slams YouTube ban on pro-Iranian group’s Lego-style AI videos
item.description: Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesman says the move aims to 'suppress the truth about their illegal war on Iran'.

item.title: Sanctioned tankers transit Strait of Hormuz amid US blockade
item.description: Chinese-owned tanker Rich Starry becomes the first sanctioned vessel to exit the Gulf after the US blockade.

item.title: Russia’s Lavrov visits China as US pressures Iran with Hormuz blockade
item.description: China and Russia have been vocal critics of the US-Israel war on Iran, an ally of both world powers.
